impact: This gives PP&D deterministic coverage that syntax preflight failures direct repair toward exactly one syntactically failing Python or daemon repair file before any domain retry.
summary: Add a narrow daemon helper and unittest for py_compile syntax_preflight repair hints.
target_task: Task checkbox-205: Add one narrow daemon helper or unittest proving syntax_preflight failures with `py_compile` details generate a next_action_hint that says to replace only one syntactically failing Python file or one daemon repair file before any domain retry.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
